creator: tempest@ecst.csuchico.edu
text:
Using tar, 1.11.2, to attempt to write multi-volume files to floppies
result in a freeze followed by a reboot. No logs appear in log message
logfile.

How-To-Repeat: su
<insert floppy>
<format, disklabel, newfs if necessary>
<select file > 1.44MB>
tar cvMf /dev/fd0 file
<machine will wedge and reboot after tar runs "out of room."
